hook: A healthy reset means learning from the relationship without turning the lesson into a permanent hardness.
body: Discernment after loss is useful; cynicism after loss usually distorts the next chapter.

hook: Some men come out of heartbreak determined never to be vulnerable again and call that wisdom.
body: Take the lesson, keep the standards, and do not let the wound become your new personality.
